name: Cheddar Harvest Fondue
recipeIngredient: 6 oz (1 1/2 cups) shredded sharp cheddar cheese
4 cups Italian bread, cut into 1-inch cubes
4 cups Assorted blanched vegetables, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine milk, apple juice, flour, mustard, onion powder, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
2. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture thickens and boils.
3. Continue cooking and stirring for one minute longer.
4. Remove from heat; add cheese and stir until melted.
5. Transfer to a fondue pot; keep warm.
6. Serve with bread cubes and assorted vegetables. This makes 4 portions (about 2 cups).
From: Steve Herrick
Source: Best Recipes Mar/Apr 1991
